author: SHAKER
name: AnimeVilla
description: Hindi Dubbed Anime plugin for Umbrella - Scrapes animevilla.in for latest Hindi dubbed anime content
changelog: v1 - Initial release with search, category browsing, home page, item details, and episode media support
readme: AnimeVilla plugin for Umbrella. Browse, search, and watch Hindi dubbed anime from animevilla.in. Supports episode listing with download links.
